title: tengine.telemetry.effect_summary v1
description: Per-frame field-effect attribution from field_summary_ring (slot 327), available after WT 545. Gated on the TENGINE_EFFECT_ATTRIBUTION env var == 1. Emitted by EffectAttributionDrainer (Phase 7). Producer: registry handle EFFECT_SUMMARY in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame}'.

frame.description: GPU frame index this summary covers.

wt_id.description: Work-type id the effect attribution is for.

effects.description: Per-effect attribution entries read from field_summary_ring for this frame; shape is effect-family specific.

frame_phase.description: Frame-phase enum value at emission time.

reload_generation.description: Hot-reload generation counter at emission time.
